question: Which team has won the most EuroLeague titles?
answer: Real Madrid with 11 titles

question: Who holds the record for most EuroLeague Final Four MVP awards?
answer: Vassilis Spanoulis with 2 Final Four MVP awards

question: What is the record for most points scored by a single player in a EuroLeague game?
answer: Alphonso Ford scored 50 points for Olympiacos in 1998

question: Which city hosted the first EuroLeague Final Four in the modern format?
answer: Barcelona hosted the first modern Final Four in 1988

question: Who is the EuroLeague all-time leading scorer?
answer: Juan Carlos Navarro with 4,152 career points

question: Which team won the first EuroLeague title in 1958?
answer: ASK Riga won the first European Champions Cup in 1958

question: How many consecutive EuroLeague titles has any team won?
answer: Real Madrid won 6 consecutive titles from 1964 to 1969

question: Which player has the most EuroLeague MVP awards?
answer: Luka Dončić, Vassilis Spanoulis, and Andrei Kirilenko each won the MVP award

question: What is the largest margin of victory in a EuroLeague game?
answer: There have been victories of over 50 points in early EuroLeague history

question: Which venue has hosted the most EuroLeague Final Four events?
answer: The city of Belgrade has been among the most frequent Final Four hosts

question: How many EuroLeague titles has Panathinaikos won?
answer: Panathinaikos has won 6 EuroLeague titles

question: Who was the youngest EuroLeague MVP?
answer: Luka Dončić won the MVP at age 19 in the 2017-18 season

question: How many countries have had a EuroLeague champion club?
answer: Teams from 10 different countries have won the EuroLeague

question: Which coach has won the most EuroLeague titles?
answer: Željko Obradović has won 9 EuroLeague titles as head coach

question: What year was the EuroLeague rebranded to the Turkish Airlines EuroLeague?
answer: The EuroLeague became the Turkish Airlines EuroLeague in 2010

question: Which player is known as the 'EuroLeague GOAT' and played for Olympiacos and Panathinaikos?
answer: Vassilis Spanoulis, who had legendary careers at both clubs

question: What is the capacity of the Stark Arena in Belgrade, a famous EuroLeague venue?
answer: The Stark Arena (formerly Kombank Arena) holds approximately 18,386 spectators

question: How many EuroLeague titles has CSKA Moscow won?
answer: CSKA Moscow has won 8 EuroLeague titles

question: Which NBA star played in the EuroLeague before going to the NBA?
answer: Many stars including Luka Dončić (Real Madrid), Tony Parker (Paris), and Nikola Jokić played in European basketball

question: What was the longest winning streak in EuroLeague history?
answer: CSKA Moscow had a winning streak of 20+ games during their dominant era

question: Which team won the EuroLeague in the 2022-23 season?
answer: Real Madrid won the 2022-23 EuroLeague title

question: How many EuroLeague titles has Maccabi Tel Aviv won?
answer: Maccabi Tel Aviv has won 6 EuroLeague titles

question: What was unique about the 2020 EuroLeague season?
answer: The 2019-20 season was cancelled due to the COVID-19 pandemic with no champion crowned

question: Which player holds the record for most assists in a single EuroLeague season?
answer: Miloš Teodosić and Shane Larkin are among the all-time assists leaders per season

question: In which country is the WiZink Center, home of Real Madrid basketball?
answer: The WiZink Center is located in Madrid, Spain with a capacity of around 15,000

question: Who scored the game-winning shot in the 2018 EuroLeague Final?
answer: Causeur and Llull led Real Madrid to the 2018 title against Fenerbahçe

question: How many teams compete in the EuroLeague regular season?
answer: 18 teams compete in the EuroLeague regular season

question: Which player won back-to-back EuroLeague titles with two different teams?
answer: Several players have achieved this rare feat throughout EuroLeague history
